# EnteleWALLET Brand Assets

Official EnteleWALLET logos and banners for the website and GitHub repository.

## Files

| File | Use |
|------|------|
| `entelewallet-wordmark.png` | Text-only lockup (ENTELE Ξ WALLET) on white |
| `entelewallet-icon-512.png` | Icon mark on white — PWA, favicon, UI |
| `entelewallet-logo-horizontal.png` | Dark banner for README / social preview |
| `social-preview.png` | GitHub social preview / Open Graph (1200×630) |

## Website paths

- `apps/web/public/brand/entelewallet-wordmark.png`
- `apps/web/public/brand/entelewallet-icon-mark.png`
- `apps/web/public/brand/entelewallet-logo-dark.png`
- `apps/web/public/icons/icon-192.png`, `icon-512.png`, `apple-touch-icon.png`
- `apps/web/public/og/entelewallet-lite-og.png`

## Tagline

**SECURE • INTELLIGENT • CONNECTED**

## GitHub social preview

Upload `.github/assets/social-preview.png` in **Settings → General → Social preview**.
